description_long: This object is a medium-sized potted plant featuring a square, reddish-brown pot with a wide rim and a slightly tapered base. The pot appears to be made of terracotta or a similar material and is filled with dark soil. Emerging from the soil are several green stems supporting large, broad, heart-shaped leaves with visible veins, resembling those of an Alocasia or Elephant Ear plant. The leaves are a muted green and are arranged at varying angles, giving the plant a lush, spreading appearance. The pot is plain with no visible decorative elements, and the plant looks healthy and well-maintained. This type of potted plant is commonly used to add greenery to urban environments such as patios, sidewalks, or building entrances.
description: A medium-sized potted plant with broad, heart-shaped green leaves in a plain, square terracotta pot filled with dark soil. The plant has multiple stems and a lush, spreading appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the square terracotta pot and the plant's broad leaves fanning out, with the soil and stems clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the pot's depth and the way the leaves extend outward, with some leaves overlapping the pot's rim.
description_view_2: Angled view showing the plant's dense foliage and the pot's wide rim, with more of the leaf structure visible.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the back of the leaves and the pot's plain surface, with stems converging at the soil.
